task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the new equipment category 'CNC Machinery'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a category list or form view showing 'CNC Machinery' as a registered equipment category.

task_completion.description: Verify the new machine 'CNC Vertical Milling Machine - Haas VF-2SS' is registered with the correct category and department.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the equipment form or list showing 'CNC Vertical Milling Machine - Haas VF-2SS'. It should indicate 'CNC Machinery' as its category and 'Manufacturing' as its department.

task_completion.description: Verify a 90-day Preventive Maintenance schedule is set for the new Haas machine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the maintenance tab or schedule settings on the Haas VF-2SS equipment form showing 'Preventive Maintenance', a frequency/period of '90' days, and assignment to a maintenance team.

task_completion.description: Verify a Corrective Maintenance Request is created for the 'Hydraulic Press - Schuler 2500T'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a maintenance request form or kanban board showing a request for the equipment 'Hydraulic Press - Schuler 2500T' with the subject 'Hydraulic pressure loss - immediate inspection required'.

task_completion.description: Verify the maintenance request has an Urgent (3 stars) priority and the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the maintenance request form for the Schuler press, look for a 3-star priority rating (Urgent) and a description or internal notes containing the text 'Hydraulic fluid leak detected at main cylinder seal. Production halted on line 3 pending repair.' (or at least the keyword 'leak').

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the web application's graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo/maintenance system web interface being navigated and filled out, not terminal windows running curl commands or Python scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the records are actually created in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data should be visible within the application's standard list, kanban, or saved form views, rather than just being typed into an unsaved draft or a separate text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer console or 'Inspect Element' panels open modifying the DOM to display the required names or values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a new equipment category 'CNC Machinery' and registering 'CNC Vertical Milling Machine - Haas VF-2SS' under it for the Manufacturing department with a 90-day preventive maintenance schedule. It also requires creating a corrective maintenance request for 'Hydraulic Press - Schuler 2500T' with the subject 'Hydraulic pressure loss - immediate inspection required', a priority of 3 stars, and a description mentioning a 'leak'.
